ghc 0 The Glasgow Haskell Compilation system
gifsicle 0 Tool for manipulating GIF images
gimp 3 GNU Image Manipulation Program

gitg 3 git repository viewer
gitk 0 fast, scalable, distributed revision control system (revision tree visualizer)

glc 0

gnome-terminal 0 GNOME terminal emulator application

gnuplot-iostream 0 C++ programming interface for gnuplot. Headers

gpac 0

gperftools 0 command line utilities to analyze the performance of C++ programs
